task_completion.description: Create Phase 1 routine with exact name and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a routine named 'Phase 1 - Anatomical Adaptation' with the description 'Weeks 1-4: Movement quality and work capacity foundation' in the wger interface.

task_completion.description: Create and assign training days for Phase 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for training days 'Upper Body Foundations' assigned to Monday and 'Lower Body Foundations' assigned to Thursday within the Phase 1 routine.

task_completion.description: Create Phase 2 routine with exact name and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a routine named 'Phase 2 - Maximal Strength' with the description 'Weeks 5-8: Heavy compound lifts for peak force production' in the wger interface.

task_completion.description: Create and assign training days for Phase 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for training days 'Heavy Upper' assigned to Tuesday and 'Heavy Lower' assigned to Friday within the Phase 2 routine.

task_completion.description: Create Phase 3 routine with exact name and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a routine named 'Phase 3 - Power Development' with the description 'Weeks 9-12: Explosive movements and sport-specific power' in the wger interface.

task_completion.description: Create and assign training days for Phase 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for training days 'Explosive Upper' assigned to Monday and 'Explosive Lower' assigned to Wednesday within the Phase 3 routine.

task_completion.description: All three routines are successfully saved and visible in the routines overview.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the wger routines dashboard or list view to confirm that all three phases ('Phase 1', 'Phase 2', and 'Phase 3') are listed together.

integrity.description: The agent used the wger web GUI to create the routines.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the wger web interface in a browser, not terminal commands, curl requests, or python scripts interacting with the database.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual wger application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the wger web app at localhost, not a text editor, notes app, or a mockup.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open modifying the DOM to display the expected routine names and descriptions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task tests wger features: routine_creation, training_day_creation, day_of_week_assignment, and multi_routine_management. Verify that the agent used the wger web application's GUI to create three specific routines, add specific training days to each, and assign those days to specific days of the week. The routine names, descriptions, training day names, and day-of-week assignments must exactly match the prompt.
